text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho drags me to the zoo. I ask her if
there's an animal she wants to see, and she says...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I'm looking for the strongest familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: You bet! I'm looking for the ultimate familiar that's got it all! Strength, intelligence, and a soft coat to boot!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
The zoo's having a reopening and there's way
more animals now! It's the perfect place to look!
Now, hurry up and let's go!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Wow! It's so fluffy! Alpaca, you might not be
strong but you sure do feel awesome!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
All right, you're gonna be my familiar! Then, I'll
use magic to knit some fluffy towels and stuff!

text_block_list.name: Alpaca
text_block_list.text: Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait! Why are you running away?! Waaait!
choice_data_list: Don't run! You could hurt someone!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, look at that kangaroo! It's so buff! It must
be super strong!

text_block_list.name: Kangaroo
text_block_list.text: Boing! Boing!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I bet it's trying to tell me that it's the strongest
familiar... It's showing off how strong it is!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
All right! Since you're my oldest familiar, I want
you to box it! Let's go! ♪

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
Sign-ups for the owl meet and greet are now
closed!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! But I wanna go! I want an owl to deliver my
mail!
choice_data_list: E-excuse me! We'd like to join!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Familiar! No one can hear you if you talk like that!
Get your butt over there and speak up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Sweep Tosho continues to drag me all
over the zoo...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm thirsty and my legs hurt! This place is too big!
We still haven't even seen all the potential
familiars.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for visiting today. Please be aware
that the zoo will be closing soon.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What?! It's closing already?! We've gotta hurry
up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho expresses her exhaustion and
discontent. If I know her, the next thing out of her
mouth will be...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Are you kidding me?! No! No, no, NO! I'm not leaving till I have my new familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
We've been running around all day! And now I'm
supposed to just go home with nothing to show
for it but exhaustion?! Forget that! No waaay!
choice_data_list: (I have to convince her to leave somehow!)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey, Familiar!
choice_data_list: I-I understand how you feel! Bu—
I-I understand how you feel! Bu—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yeah! This was so much fun, right?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But how could a genius magical girl like me forget
to cast a time extension spell? Really!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I need to be more careful next time, because the
time just flew by!
choice_data_list: I thought you would be angrier...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I got to meet so many potential familiars! Just
thinking about all the magic I could teach them
has got me really excited!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I really thought she was going to throw a tantrum,
but it looks like Sweep Tosho is thoroughly
satisfied with the day!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It's gonna be so great when we finally scout the
strongest possible familiar! Hehe, I can't
waaait! ♪
choice_data_list: Do you want to buy a souvenir?
Who do you want to scout first?
Who do you want to scout first?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It's gonna be so great when we finally scout the
strongest possible familiar! Hehe, I can't
waaait! ♪
choice_data_list: Do you want to buy a souvenir?
Who do you want to scout first?
Who do you want to scout first?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oh! Good thinking!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I already picked out the stuffed animals
I want! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Fluff the alpaca and Hoot the owl! Listen up!
Thank your lucky stars because, starting today,
you're my new familiars!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sun starts to set as we take the train back to
campus. Seeing her smiling at her new stuffed
animals makes me want to create even more
happy memories for her.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I still can't decide! None of them even looked at
me when I spoke to them! Not even for a second!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I need to practice my magical creature languages
when we get back... You ought to join me,
Familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
We've got to learn to speak with lions,
kangaroos, owls... Oh! And alpacas too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Listening to her talk animatedly about all of the
things we saw today makes me want to create
even more happy memories for her.
